summary: Tested 3 Map Decorators bug fixes. All 3 bugs verified as FIXED: BUG 1 (toolbar position), BUG 2 (delete button), BUG 3 (color picker). Backend API tests: 5/5 passed. Frontend UI tests: All passed on Desktop, iPad, and Mobile viewports.

BUG_1_toolbar_position.description: Toolbar moved OUTSIDE canvas as separate bar below area tabs

verification.desktop_1920x1080: Toolbar bottom=164, Canvas top=168 - NOT overlapping
verification.ipad_768x1024: Toolbar bottom=192, Canvas top=196 - NOT overlapping
verification.mobile_390x844: Toolbar bottom=208, Canvas top=212 - NOT overlapping

BUG_2_delete_button.description: Delete button now works with e.preventDefault() and proper event handling
BUG_2_delete_button.verification: Decorator count decreased from 19 to 18 after clicking delete button

BUG_3_color_picker.description: Color picker has higher z-index (z-[60]) and proper event propagation stopping
BUG_3_color_picker.verification: Color dropdown appeared with 6 colors, clicking green changed decorator color

details: test_all_decorator_types - PASSED (hline, vline, rect, circle, text)

selection_model_change.details: User must TAP/CLICK on decorator to SELECT it (orange dashed outline appears), then delete/color buttons become visible

context_for_next_testing_agent: Map Decorators 3 bug fixes verified: (1) Toolbar now rendered OUTSIDE canvas in separate div, (2) Delete button has e.preventDefault() and works, (3) Color picker has z-[60] and proper event handling. Selection changed from hover to click-based. All responsive viewports tested.
